# LUXEMIA - Luxury Indian Ethnic Wear

> LuxeMia is a luxury Indian ethnic wear online boutique shipping worldwide to USA, UK, Canada, and beyond. We specialize in handcrafted bridal lehengas, designer sarees, anarkali suits, sherwanis, and Indo-Western outfits for NRIs and the global Indian diaspora.

## About LuxeMia

LuxeMia curates authentic Indian ethnic wear directly from master craftsmen across India. Every piece features genuine hand-embroidery, zari work, and traditional techniques passed down through generations. We serve the modern NRI (Non-Resident Indian) who values heritage craftsmanship with contemporary styling.

## Product Categories

### Lehengas
- Bridal Lehengas: Red, Pink, Rani, Off-White silk lehengas with heavy embroidery
- Wedding Lehengas: Net, Silk, Velvet lehengas for wedding ceremonies
- Festive Lehengas: Lighter embroidery for festivals like Diwali, Navratri
- Reception Lehengas: Elegant designs for wedding reception events

### Sarees
- Silk Sarees: Banarasi, Kanjivaram, Gadwal silk sarees
- Bridal Sarees: Heavy work sarees for wedding ceremonies
- Occasional Sarees: Embroidery work sarees for events

### Salwar Kameez & Suits
- Anarkali Suits: Floor-length elegant suits with sequin and embroidery work
- Sharara Sets: Wide-leg palazzo style suits
- Palazzo Suits: Modern cut suits with traditional embroidery

### Menswear
- Sherwanis: Art silk groom sherwanis with hand embroidery
- Kurta Pajama: Festive and wedding kurtas

### Jewelry & Accessories
- Statement necklaces, earrings, and bangles to complement ethnic outfits

### Indo-Western
- Fusion wear combining Indian and Western silhouettes

## Key Information

- Free worldwide shipping on orders over $300
- 7-day hassle-free return policy
- Custom sizing available for bridal wear
- Express shipping (3-5 business days) available
- Standard shipping: 7-12 business days
- Custom bridal lehengas: 3-4 weeks crafting time
- WhatsApp styling consultation available
- Currency: USD (also accepts INR, GBP, CAD)
- Contact: hello@luxemia.com | +1-215-341-9990

## Blog & Guides

Our blog covers Indian wedding fashion, styling advice, and cultural guides:
- Indian Wedding Dress Guide: Bridal Lehenga vs Saree
- Red Bridal Lehenga Trends 2026
- Wedding Guest Outfit Ideas
- Saree Draping Styles for Every Occasion
- NRI Wedding Ethnic Wear Trends
- Fabric Guide: Georgette, Silk & Chiffon
- Sharara Suit Guide 2026
- Pakistani Suits & Anarkali Shopping Guide
- How to Style Lehenga Choli for Every Wedding Event
